meta.title: About Us
meta.description: Born from a deep love for Yogyakarta. Learn about Alesha Journeys and our mission.

hero.title: We Are Alesha Journeys
hero.subtitle: Curating authentic memories in the heart of Java.

story.label: Our Story
story.title: Born from a deep love for Yogyakarta.
story.p1: Alesha Journeys didn't start in an office; it began on the back of a vintage scooter cruising through the narrow alleys of Kotagede and the quiet temple paths of Prambanan. We saw a gap between the standard "tourist routes" and the vibrant, breathing soul of Yogyakarta that locals know.
story.p2: Our mission is simple: to show you the authentic side of our home. We want you to feel the warmth of a Javanese morning, the richness of our heritage, and the genuine smiles of people who call this land home.
story.p3: With a team of local experts, historians, and friends, we curate journeys that are personal, sustainable, and deeply immersive. We don't just take you to places; we connect you to stories.

items.title: Authenticity
items.desc: We bypass the generic to bring you true Javanese culture, from hidden art studios to the best morning gudeg in town.

items.title: Sustainability
items.desc: Protecting our heritage and supporting local artisans ensures that the Yogyakarta we love thrives for generations.

items.title: Warmth
items.desc: In Javanese, we call it ‘Ngayogyakarto’ — a feeling of being at home. We treat every guest as a member of our family.

team.title: Meet the Curators
team.subtitle: The passionate locals who bring your Indonesian adventures to life.
